transcription.text: Instead of offering something that appeals solely to your heart or your eyes, here's something that will appeal to every inch and ounce of your being. A new front-wheel drive Subaru Legacy L with power windows for your fingers, AM-FM stereo cassette for your ears, comfortable seats for your bum, anti-lock brakes for your feet, inspired engineering for your frontal lobes, and a special price for a good feeling in your gut. The new Subaru Legacy L, a car for all of you. For more information, visit www.subs.org
